dashboard.title: Paper Trader League — Season 4: Gainers & Losers

targets.rawSql: SELECT time, portfolio_value_usd, btc_benchmark FROM bot_metrics WHERE season = 4 ORDER BY time DESC LIMIT 1000

SELECT symbol, entry_price, current_price, (current_price/entry_price - 1) * 100 as gain_pct, entry_time, elapsed_hours FROM bot_positions WHERE bot_id = 'loser_reversal_hunter' AND status = 'open' ORDER BY elapsed_hours DESC

SELECT symbol, entry_price, current_price, (current_price/entry_price - 1) * 100 as gain_pct, entry_time, elapsed_hours FROM bot_positions WHERE bot_id = 'gainer_momentum_catcher' AND status = 'open' ORDER BY elapsed_hours DESC
SELECT SUM(realized_pnl_usd) as pnl FROM bot_trades WHERE bot_id = 'loser_reversal_hunter' AND DATE(exit_time) = CURRENT_DATE
SELECT SUM(realized_pnl_usd) as pnl FROM bot_trades WHERE bot_id = 'gainer_momentum_catcher' AND DATE(exit_time) = CURRENT_DATE

SELECT entry_time, exit_time, symbol, entry_price, exit_price, (exit_price/entry_price - 1) * 100 as gain_pct, realized_pnl_usd FROM bot_trades WHERE bot_id = 'loser_reversal_hunter' ORDER BY exit_time DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT entry_time, exit_time, symbol, entry_price, exit_price, (exit_price/entry_price - 1) * 100 as gain_pct, realized_pnl_usd FROM bot_trades WHERE bot_id = 'gainer_momentum_catcher' ORDER BY exit_time DESC LIMIT 50

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN realized_pnl_usd > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / COUNT(*)::float * 100, 1) as win_rate FROM bot_trades WHERE bot_id = 'loser_reversal_hunter' AND DATE(exit_time) >= CURRENT_DATE - 7

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN realized_pnl_usd > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END)::float / COUNT(*)::float * 100, 1) as win_rate FROM bot_trades WHERE bot_id = 'gainer_momentum_catcher' AND DATE(exit_time) >= CURRENT_DATE - 7
SELECT MIN(portfolio_value_usd) as min_value, (MIN(portfolio_value_usd) / MAX(portfolio_value_usd) - 1) * 100 as max_drawdown_pct FROM bot_metrics WHERE season = 4
SELECT symbol, change_24h_pct, change_1h_pct, last_updated FROM coinbase_big_losers ORDER BY last_updated DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT symbol, change_24h_pct, change_15m_pct, volume_usd_24h, last_updated FROM coinbase_big_gainers ORDER BY last_updated DESC LIMIT 20
